case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JORGE MARIO JEREZ GUERRA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-22-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, JORGE MARIO JEREZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRA, JORGE MARIO JEREZ $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, JORGE MARIO JEREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-10-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY ALEJANDRA CHANQUIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
